inputs.label: Crop Type
inputs.businessContext: Different crops have different nutrient requirements. Based on FAO guidelines and agronomic standards.

inputs.label: Soil Nitrogen (ppm)
inputs.businessContext: Measured via soil test. Typical range 0-200 ppm. Based on ISO 11261 standard for soil nitrogen determination.

inputs.label: Soil Phosphorus (ppm)
inputs.businessContext: Measured via soil test. Typical range 0-100 ppm. Based on Bray-1 or Olsen methods.

inputs.label: Soil Potassium (ppm)
inputs.businessContext: Measured via soil test. Typical range 0-500 ppm. Based on ammonium acetate extraction.

inputs.label: Target Yield (kg/ha)
inputs.businessContext: Desired yield per hectare. Based on crop potential and historical data.

inputs.label: Fertilizer Type
inputs.businessContext: Different fertilizers have different nutrient concentrations. Based on industry standard formulations.

inputs.label: Application Method
inputs.businessContext: Affects efficiency and dosage. Based on agronomic practices.

inputs.label: Efficiency Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of applied nutrient taken up by crop. Typical 50-90% depending on method and conditions.

thresholds.soilNitrogen: if soilNitrogen > 150 then 'High nitrogen level, reduce dosage'
thresholds.soilPhosphorus: if soilPhosphorus > 80 then 'High phosphorus level, reduce dosage'
thresholds.soilPotassium: if soilPotassium > 400 then 'High potassium level, reduce dosage'
thresholds.efficiencyFactor: if efficiencyFactor < 50 then 'Low efficiency, consider improving application method'

suggestedActions: if efficiencyFactor < 60 then 'Consider using controlled-release fertilizers or improving application timing'
if soilNitrogen > 150 then 'Reduce nitrogen application and consider cover crops to utilize excess'
if soilPhosphorus > 80 then 'Switch to low-phosphorus fertilizer or skip phosphorus application'
